message:
fix(security): block extension fs_write outside workspace root (adversarial gap G2)

Add __pi_host_check_write_access(path) host bridge function to the
QuickJS runtime enforcing write-path confinement for extension node:fs
write APIs.

- Retrieve current extension ID from __pi_current_extension_id global
- No-op when no extension is active (standalone harness compatibility)
- Compute workspace root via safe_canonicalize(process_cwd)
- Resolve requested path (handling absolute and relative)
- Verify path falls within workspace root OR registered extension
  read roots
- Throw "host write denied: path outside extension root" on violation

Closes adversarial gap G2 tracked as bd-31lp8.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
